title: Library choice for new payments service
subtitle: 3 small decisions before scaffolding the project

decisions.title: HTTP client
decisions.summary: Sync vs async, control over retries
decisions.current_example: // no client picked yet — placeholder calls scattered across services

options.label: httpx with built-in retries
options.preview:
async with httpx.AsyncClient() as c:
    resp = await c.get(url)

decisions.rationale: Most callers are sync today. Going async means rewriting billing-worker first.

decisions.title: Logging format
decisions.current_example: 2024-09-12 14:22:01 INFO charge processed for user 42

options.label: Keep plain text
options.preview: 2024-09-12 14:22:01 INFO charge processed for user 42

options.label: unittest (stdlib)
options.preview:
class TestCharge(unittest.TestCase):
    def test_ok(self):
        self.assertEqual(charge(10), 10)
